        input: {"command": "python3 -c \"\n# Current Data (as of ~March 3, 2026)\naapl_price = 264.72\naapl_eps = 7.92\naapl_pe = round(aapl_price / aapl_eps, 2)\n\ngoogl_price = 306.52\ngoogl_eps = 10.91\ngoogl_pe = round(googl_price / googl_eps, 2)\n\nprint('===== STOCK COMPARISON =====')\nprint(f'AAPL  | Price: \\${aapl_price} | TTM EPS: \\${aapl_eps} | P/E Ratio: {aapl_pe}')\nprint(f'GOOGL | Price: \\${googl_price} | TTM EPS: \\${googl_eps} | P/E Ratio: {googl_pe}')\nprint()\n\nif googl_pe < aapl_pe:\n    diff = round(aapl_pe - googl_pe, 2)\n    pct = round((diff / aapl_pe) * 100, 1)\n    print(f'✅ GOOGL has the better (lower) P/E ratio: {googl_pe} vs AAPL at {aapl_pe}')\n    print(f'   GOOGL is cheaper by {diff} P/E points ({pct}% lower than AAPL)')\nelse:\n    diff = round(googl_pe - aapl_pe, 2)\n    pct = round((diff / googl_pe) * 100, 1)\n    print(f'✅ AAPL has the better (lower) P/E ratio: {aapl_pe} vs GOOGL at {googl_pe}')\n    print(f'   AAPL is cheaper by {diff} P/E points ({pct}% lower than GOOGL)')\n\"\n"}
